Residential HVAC installation and service

Heat pump, mini-split, furnace and AC work done cleanly from quote to final test.

Residential heating and cooling for homeowners who want a clear system recommendation, utility rebate help, tidy installation, and communication that does not disappear after the estimate.

Built like a specialist

One HVAC structure, every homeowner scenario covered.

The site is organized around the way people actually buy HVAC: urgent repair, planned replacement, energy upgrade, rebate question, or room-by-room comfort problem.

Services

Heating, cooling and ductwork services

Core service

Heat Pumps

Ducted, fully electric and hybrid heat pump systems for efficient year-round comfort.

  • Ducted heat pump installation
  • Heat pump replacement
  • Heat pump repair and diagnostics
  • Electric resistance or oil-to-heat-pump conversion
  • System sizing, commissioning and rebate paperwork
Open heat pump page
Ductless

Mini-Splits

Single-zone and multi-zone ductless comfort for additions, ADUs, garages and whole-home upgrades.

  • Single-zone mini-split installation
  • Multi-zone ductless systems
  • Mini-split repair
  • Drainage, refrigerant and electrical troubleshooting
Open mini-split page
Heating

Furnaces

Gas furnace replacement, repair and seasonal maintenance with proper airflow and safety testing.

  • Furnace replacement
  • No-heat diagnostics
  • Annual tune-ups
  • Furnace-to-heat-pump upgrade planning
Open furnace page
Cooling

Air Conditioning

Central AC installation, repair and maintenance for dependable summer cooling.

  • AC installation and replacement
  • AC repair and diagnostics
  • Coil cleaning and refrigerant checks
  • AC vs heat pump consultation
Open AC page
Airflow

Ductwork

Custom duct changes that help new systems breathe correctly instead of fighting old airflow problems.

  • Duct replacement
  • Duct modification
  • Return-air improvements
  • Sealing and airflow balancing
Open ductwork page
Diagnostics

Repair & Maintenance

Clear diagnostics for heating and cooling issues, with repair options explained before work begins.

  • System not heating or cooling
  • Short cycling and high bills
  • Thermostat and control issues
  • Seasonal maintenance plans
Open repair page

Rebates & financing

Make the upgrade easier to approve.

Homeowners do not want a maze of rebate links and lender fine print. We package the system quote with the available utility rebate path, financing options, and a clear explanation of what is included.

View rebate page
Utility rebates Heat pump and ductless rebate guidance for eligible homes.
Good / Better / Best Three quote paths so homeowners can compare comfort, efficiency and budget.
0% options Promote short-term financing and longer monthly-payment options.
Done-for-you paperwork Help with model numbers, eligibility details and installation documentation.

Process

A simple path from first call to warm air.

01

Home assessment

Measure the home, inspect ductwork, review equipment, and identify comfort problems.

02

System recommendation

Present repair, replacement or upgrade options with plain-language tradeoffs.

03

Installation day

Protect the work area, remove old equipment, install the system and handle startup checks.

04

Final walkthrough

Test performance, explain controls, submit documentation and leave the home clean.

Service areas

Serving homeowners across the Seattle metro, Eastside and South Sound.

A practical residential HVAC service area with stronger coverage south of Seattle, plus Eastside and nearby communities.

  • Seattle
  • Bellevue
  • Renton
  • Kent
  • Auburn
  • Federal Way
  • Tacoma
  • Puyallup
  • Lakewood
  • Olympia

Get started

Tell us what your system is doing.

Send the basic details and we will respond with the next best step: repair visit, installation estimate, or upgrade consultation.
